name: Can I get damages if answer engine optimization fails completely?
description: Wasted fees, lost profits if proven.[1] Use analytics.

mainEntity.name: Can I get damages if answer engine optimization fails completely?

acceptedAnswer.text: Wasted fees, lost profits if proven.[1] Use analytics.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, recoverable damages include wasted fees, lost profits from reduced leads, if causally linked to provider's failures.** Capped by contract sometimes.[1]

Quantify via analytics; speculative losses harder.[1] Viable in California courts like San Jose.

**Key factors:**
- Direct costs refunded.
- Projected leads x case value.
- Competitor benchmarks.
- No mitigation? Reduces claim.

Hire forensic accountant for calculations. Demand letter often prompts settlement.
